channel.title: Etsy-Favs on The Beige Journal
channel.description: Recent content in Etsy-Favs on The Beige Journal

item.title: Best Digital Gift Ideas for the Digital Planner This Christmas 2025
item.description:
As the festive season approaches, finding the perfect gift for the tech-savvy organizer in your life can feel like a daunting task. With digital tools taking center stage in our daily routines, digital planners have become more than just productivity aids—they’re a lifestyle statement. Whether you’re shopping for someone who loves to map out their goals or someone who thrives on staying organized, a thoughtful digital gift can be both functional and inspiring.

In this blog, we’ve curated a list of the best digital gift ideas tailored for digital planners, featuring innovative tools, apps, and accessories that make planning for 2025 both stylish and efficient. From premium digital planners to must-have tablet accessories, you’ll find options to delight every productivity enthusiast on your list. Let’s dive into the ultimate gift guide that will make this Christmas truly unforgettable for the digital planner in your life!

item.title: Best School Digital Planners for Students 2024
item.description:
As the new academic year approaches, it’s time to gear up with the best tools to ensure your success. In today’s digital age, traditional paper planners are being replaced by more efficient and versatile digital planners. Whether you’re a high school student juggling multiple classes and extracurricular activities or a college student managing a hectic schedule, having a reliable digital planner can make all the difference. In this blog, we’ll explore the best school digital planners for students in 2024, highlighting their features, benefits, and how they can help you stay organized and on top of your academic game. Let’s dive into the top picks that will make this school year your most productive one yet!

Digital Academic Student Planner

item.title: Best Teacher Digital Planners for 2024
item.description:
As the new school year approaches, teachers everywhere are preparing their classrooms, lesson plans, and schedules. In today’s digital age, traditional paper planners are giving way to digital alternatives that offer unmatched convenience and versatility. Digital planners are becoming essential tools for educators, helping them stay organized, manage their time efficiently, and seamlessly integrate with various digital devices. In this blog post, we’ll explore the best teacher digital planners for 2024, highlighting their features, benefits, and how they can transform your teaching experience. Whether you’re a seasoned teacher or new to the profession, these planners will help you start the year off right and stay on top of your game all year long.

Digital Teacher Planner 2024-2025 (Dated)

Stay organized and enhance your teaching efficiency with our Digital Teacher Planner for the academic year 2024-2025. This dated planner offers a comprehensive solution for teachers to manage their schedules, lesson plans, and administrative tasks. It includes monthly and weekly views, customizable sections, and templates tailored for educational settings. Designed for digital use, it is compatible with tablets and digital note-taking apps, allowing for easy access and updates on the go. Perfect for tech-savvy educators seeking a streamlined, paperless approach to planning their school year.

item.title: Best punch needle kits for beginners
item.description:
Are you ready to dive into the colorful and creative world of punch needle embroidery? Whether you’re a seasoned crafter looking for your next project or a newbie eager to pick up a new hobby, you’re in for a treat! Today, I’m thrilled to share with you a handpicked compilation of punch needle kits that are perfect for beginners and delightful for experienced needle artists alike.

Punch needle embroidery, with its rich textures and vibrant colors, is not just a crafting trend; it’s a relaxing and rewarding way to create beautiful art pieces that add a personal touch to your home or make for thoughtful, handmade gifts. From charming plant patterns to cozy pillowcases, and from bold tiger designs to delicate floral motifs, these kits offer something for everyone.

item.title: The best 2024 Dated Digital Planner for GoodNotes, iPad & Android
item.description:
As we step into 2024, it’s time to talk about the one tool that can revolutionize the way we organize our lives – the digital planner. If you’re anything like me, you’ll know that finding the perfect planner is like discovering a hidden treasure. And today, I’m here to share that treasure with you.

In the realm of digital planners, the game has changed dramatically. Gone are the days of clunky interfaces and limited features. The year 2024 has brought us an array of options that are not just functional but also a delight to use. And if you’re a fan of GoodNotes, hold onto your hats because the GoodNotes planner options this year are nothing short of spectacular.

item.title: 10 Spook-tacular Digital Planner Sticker Kits for Halloween 2023!
item.description:
Halloween is upon us, and what better way to spruce up your digital planners than with some spine-chilling stickers and eerie embellishments? Whether you’re jotting down your haunted to-dos or planning a monster bash, here are some ghoulish goodies from Etsy to elevate your digital planner game this October!

October Digital Stickers 2023 - Goodnotes

Are you a stickler for seasonality? Dive into the fall spirit with this October-themed sticker set for Goodnotes! Complete with ghosts, haunted houses, and pumpkins, these stickers perfectly encapsulate the essence of Halloween. Planning has never felt this spooky yet delightful!

Get them here!

Cute Spooky Retro Halloween Digital Stickers

Turn back time this Halloween with these retro-inspired digital stickers! Bursting with vibrant hues and classic motifs like black cats, witches, and vintage pumpkins, this set is perfect for those who adore a touch of nostalgia in their planners. Elevate your planning with a dash of old-school Halloween charm.

item.title: 10 Festive Items for Digital Planners: Christmas 2023 edition
item.description:
The holiday season is upon us, and what better way to get into the spirit than by decking out our digital planners with some festive flair? If you’re anything like me, you’re always on the hunt for the cutest and most functional digital stickers and tools to make your planning experience both fun and efficient. So, I’ve done a little sleuthing and found some absolute gems for you. Let’s dive in!

1. December Christmas Digital Stickers by BreezyOrganization

Get ready to sprinkle some holiday magic onto your digital planner with these adorable December Christmas stickers. This set boasts over 30 December-themed stickers that are just too cute to resist. From delightful cookies to a festive llama and a classic farmhouse truck, these stickers are perfect for setting the holiday mood. And guess what? They even come with HEX codes to ensure you get the perfect color match every time. Whether you’re a farmhouse lover or just someone who adores all things Christmas, these stickers are sure to make your December planning sessions a joy.

item.title: 10 PLR Digital Planners to Help You Make Passive Income in 2024
item.description:
If you’ve been searching for a way to make passive income, you’re in the right place. Today, we’re diving deep into the world of PLR digital planners available on Etsy. But first, let’s clear up a couple of things.

What is PLR?

PLR stands for “Private Label Rights.” In simple terms, it means you can purchase a product, like a digital planner, and have the rights to rebrand and resell it as your own. Imagine buying a cake mix, adding your own special ingredients, and then selling it as your unique recipe. That’s PLR in a nutshell!

Why Use PLR?

  1. Time-Saver: Creating products from scratch can be time-consuming. With PLR, the groundwork is already done for you.

  2. Cost-Effective: Hiring designers or spending hours designing can be expensive. PLR products are usually affordable.

item.title: The Best Habit Tracker Stickers for Your Digital Planner
item.description: If you’re anything like me, you’ve probably dived deep into the world of digital planning. And why not? With apps like GoodNotes making our lives so much easier, it’s a no-brainer to go digital. But here’s the thing: while our digital planners are fantastic on their own, there’s something incredibly satisfying about personalizing them with digital stickers. It’s like adding a sprinkle of magic to our daily tasks and goals. And when it comes to tracking habits? Well, that’s where habit tracker stickers come into play. They’re not just cute; they’re functional, helping us stay on track and achieve our goals. So, if you’re on the hunt for the best habit tracker stickers to jazz up your digital planner, you’re in the right place. Let’s dive in and explore the world of digital stickers, specifically designed for all you GoodNotes users and digital planning aficionados out there!

item.title: Kickstart 2024 with Digital Planning with GoodNotes New Year Stickers!
item.description:
As we bid adieu to 2023 and eagerly await the dawn of 2024, it’s the perfect time to jazz up our digital planners. And guess what? GoodNotes stickers are the trendiest way to do just that! Dive into this blog post as we explore the vibrant world of digital planner stickers and how they can make your New Year planning sessions both fun and efficient. Whether you’re a seasoned GoodNotes user or just stepping into the realm of digital planning, we’ve got some sparkling tips and tricks to make 2024 your most organized year yet! Let’s get started, shall we?

Fresh Start Digital Stickers for GoodNotes

These digital stickers are designed for GoodNotes and feature a fresh start theme, perfect for the new year. The set includes various stickers with motivational quotes, symbols, and illustrations that can be used to decorate your digital planner or journal.

item.title: Best Student Digital Planners You Need in 2023/2024
item.description:
The start of a new academic year is the perfect time to get organized and set yourself up for success. With the rise of digital planners, students now have a plethora of options to choose from. Here are some of the best student planners available on Etsy that you need to check out:

1. Student GoodNotes Digital Planner

  • Price: CA$1.28 (Original Price: CA$4.28)

  • Description: This planner is designed to help students stay organized and on track with their academic goals. It offers a variety of features including monthly, weekly, and daily planning pages, a class schedule, and a study tracker. The planner also comes with a set of digital stickers to add a personal touch.

2. Student Digital Planner, Academic Planner 2023-2024 by Planhappylife

item.title: Best digital planner that syncs with google calendar
item.description:
I can see why digital planners are the most popular stationery items these days. It is portable, transportable, and free of clutter. However, there appears to be a feature lacking, which is automatically telling you when you have an appointment or an event scheduled. While this may appear to be too good to be true, there are a few planners who can attain these objectives. It can assist you in adding events and notifications to your Google Calendar or iCal.

Let’s check out these digital planners!

See on Etsy

item.title: 8 must-have digital planners to get mom for Mother's Day
item.description:
Being a mom is no easy feat, and if there’s anyone who knows that, it’s you! Your mom has always been there for you, juggling work, family, and her personal life with grace and poise. With all the tasks and responsibilities that come with being a supermom, it’s no wonder that effective planning is essential for her.

As Mother’s Day approaches, you want to find the perfect gift to show your love and appreciation for everything she does. Why not give her a thoughtful and practical gift that makes her daily routine easier? This year, consider a digital planner to help her keep her life organized, reduce stress, and save time.

In this blog post, we’ve handpicked a list of the top 10 must-have digital planners to surprise your mom with this Mother’s Day.

item.title: Unique Mother’s Day gift ideas for digital planner-obsessed moms
item.description:
Mother’s Day is just around the corner, and if your mom is part of the digital planning world, you’ve come to the right place for gift ideas! We’ve compiled a list of the best Mother’s Day gifts that will make your digital planner obsessed mom feel extra special. Whether she’s a newbie or a seasoned pro, these gifts are sure to make her smile and help her level up her digital planning game.

High-Quality Digital Stylus

A digital stylus is an essential tool for any digital planner enthusiast. Upgrade your mom’s stylus game with a top-of-the-line option like the Apple Pencil, Samsung S Pen, or the Logitech Crayon. These options offer a smooth, precise, and responsive writing experience, perfect for note-taking, sketching, and digital planning.

item.title: The Best Digital Recipe Books For Your Kitchen
item.description:
Are you tired of messy kitchen surfaces, torn recipe cards, and stacks of cookbooks taking up valuable kitchen space? The future of cooking has here in the form of digitized recipe books. With the increased use of smartphones, tablets, and other digital devices, many home cooks are turning to digital recipe books to simplify their cooking process and make meal preparation more effortless than ever. In this article, we’ll look at the advantages of digital recipe books and recommend our favorite must-have digital cookbooks. Get ready to improve your cooking game now that you have the power of digital recipes at your disposal.

Why digital recipe books?

Traditional cookbooks offer various advantages that digital recipe books do not. They save space in your kitchen and provide instant access to hundreds of recipes from around the world. With a few taps on your smartphone or tablet, you can find recipes that match your dietary restrictions, cooking level, and taste preferences. And, unlike physical cookbooks, digital books are portable and can be accessed from anywhere, whether in the kitchen or out shopping.

item.title: Organize Your Academic Life with the Best Digital Planners for Students
item.description:
Keeping up with coursework, assignments, and exams as a student can be a difficult task. With so much to remember, it’s easy to become overwhelmed and fall behind. This is where digital student planners come into play.

These tools can help you stay organised, manage your time effectively, and never miss another deadline again. We’ve compiled a list of the best digital planners for students in this blog post.

These planners are designed to make your academic life easier and more manageable, with customizable templates and seamless syncing capabilities.

So, whether you’re in high school or college, keep reading to find the best digital planner to help you stay on track and succeed in your academic pursuits.

item.title: Best digital planners for Android
item.description:
Tired of lugging along a cumbersome paper planner that weighs more than your laptop?

Maybe you’re looking for a more eco-friendly way to keep track of your schedule, because protecting the earth is the new black.

In any case, digital planners are the ideal answer for being organised and productive on the go while preserving the environment. There are now more digital planner options than you can shake a stylus at, due to the increasing number of smartphones and tablets.

But, with so many options, picking a digital planner can be more difficult than picking a Netflix show. This is where we step in.

In this post, we’ve compiled a list of the best digital planners for Android users.

item.title: How to achieve a "witchy" aesthetic
item.description:
What is a “witchy aesthetic?

A “witchy” aesthetic often includes elements of nature, such as plants, herbs, and crystals. It may also incorporate items associated with witchcraft and magic, such as tarot cards, cauldrons, and broomsticks. The color palette is often dark and muted, with shades of black, purple, and deep red. Textures like velvet, suede, and lace are common. The overall vibe is mysterious, with a hint of eeriness and a touch of elegance.

What are some “witchy” imagery?

Decorations like dried flowers, vintage apothecary jars, and candles are also popular in a witchy aesthetic. The imagery used in this aesthetic is often inspired by the occult, like astrology and alchemy symbols, and often featuring imagery of the moon and stars.

item.title: How to Create a Digital Planner with Canva: A Step-by-Step Guide - no exporting needed & template included!
item.description:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PoEax9kib54&ab_channel=createwithmommy

Hey there, planner enthusiasts! 📒✨ If you’ve ever wondered how to create a digital planner using Canva, you’re in the right place. Today, I’m going to walk you through the process, step by step. Whether you want to create a planner for personal use or sell, this guide will get you started. So, let’s dive in!

1. The Basics of making a digital planner with Canva

Canva has made it incredibly easy to design digital planners. With its new feature that allows you to link pages, you no longer need to juggle multiple software. Everything can be done within Canva itself. Here’s a basic structure to start with:

  • Cover Page: The first impression of your planner.

  • Index or Home Page: A quick navigation guide.

item.title: The NEW 2023 undated digital planner
item.description:
BUY ON ETSY

Introducing the 2023 Undated Pink Digital Planner - the perfect solution for organizing your life in the new year!

This lightweight digital planner is a must-have for anyone looking to stay on top of their schedule, tasks, and goals in 2023. The planner is undated, so you can start using it at any time, and it’s easy to customize to fit your unique needs.

The planner features a sleek and stylish pink design, making it a great accessory for your digital device. It’s compatible with all popular devices, such as smartphones, tablets, and laptops with the use of a PDF annotation app.

The planner includes a variety of helpful features, such as:

item.title: 10 unique iPad accessories you need to have
item.description:
The best thing about digital planning and using iPad as your notebook is that you can dress it up however you want. The best iPad accessories can increase your productivity and also motivate you to get your tasks done. Since an iPad is an expensive investment we should make use of it as much as possible so here are some unique find that I found on Etsy to get the most out of your iPad.

  1. Apple pencil silicone case
  2. Apple pencil case
  3. Acrylic iPad Stand Holder
  4. Natural iPad App Icons
  5. Real pressed green plants resin case
  6. Real pressed white flower case
  7. Portable Wooden Adjustable Holder
  8. iPad Case with Keyboard and Trackpad
  9. Minimalist iPad Pouch
  10. Kawaii Apple Pencil Holder

Get your free digital planner!

[sc name=“gumroad_freedigitalplanner”][/sc]

item.title: 9 cute things from Etsy to help your kids with their routine
item.description:
Now that I’m a mom, life has been hectic and I am starting to want to create more of a routine for myself.  I’ve also learned that kids can also start having their own routines, so now that my kids are getting older and I want to start them off with a schedule so they know what’s coming in the day.  This also helps them prepare mentally for what’s happening to avoid any tantrum so here are a few things that I found on Etsy that will help create a schedule for everyone and some thing that will look aesthetically pleasing around the house

My all time favourite is from The Creative Sprout Co because it’s available in a few different languages.  If you’re into adding your native language to the whole routine and want to introduce a second language, I highly recommend them!

item.title: Digital Planner Black Friday/Cyber Monday Sale 2022!
item.description:
The holiday season is around the corner and we’re excited for sales!

As a stationery lover, Etsy is always my favourite place to search for unique items. So, I always make sure to check Etsy during Black Friday and Cyber Monday sales for all holiday gifts (and something extra for me :) )

So while you’re searching for your next planner, don’t forget to check their Etsy Gift Guide for gifts for your close ones (or for yourself!)

See the Etsy Gift Guide

And the list you’ve been waiting for! Our Black Friday/Cyber Monday Sale list for 2022!

During this time, you’ll be able to save big on some of our most popular digital planners. So don’t wait, take advantage of this great opportunity and get yourself a digital planner today at some of these amazing shops!

item.title: The best digital planners for GoodNotes in 2023
item.description:
Are you looking for the best digital planner for 2023? Look no further than the planners on this list! These planners are perfect for anyone who wants to be more organized and productive in the new year. From simple to-do lists to complex schedules, these planners can help you get it all done. And with so many great features, you’re sure to find one that’s perfect for you. So take a look and start planning for a great year ahead!

What is a digital planner?

A digital planner is a PDF planner that helps you keep track of your schedule and to-do list. It can be used on an iPad, tablet, or Android phone. You can use a PDF annotation app like Goodnotes to write down appointments and reminders for yourself, and it can be synced across all your devices.

item.title: Shop Spotlight: JeyDesignShop + Coupon Code!
item.description:
What’s the story behind your shop?

I’ve always had a huge passion for graphic design since I was like 12, but I had to put this passion aside to concentrate more on my studies.
In 2020 I was studying mathematics at the university and I purchased an iPad for my notes in order to lighten my bag. And that’s how I discovered the existence of digital planners and got back to graphic design! After some months creating stuff for myself I decided to finally open my shop. ❤️

Where can we find your shop?

Etsy Shop

What kind of items do you sell in your shop?

Digital, Printable

What is the inspiration behind your designs?

I love minimal and clean designs, which give you the freedom to decorate the pages as you like. But my main focus when I create my products is their functionality and I have a lot of fun when I sketch/brainstorm everything that comes to my mind!

item.title: 2022 Digital Planner Roundup
item.description:
It’s that time of year again, when we think about all the lovely new planners that are going to help reach our yearly goals! We can’t wait to start planning out our life with all of these options. And it’s not just planners - in this roundup, you’ll find all of the best picks that will help you get organized and plan your future!

Take a look at this long list of curated planners for your planning needs!

item.title: The best digital planners for Goodnotes on the iPad 2023
item.description:
There are a lot of great digital planners out there for the iPad, and it can be tough to decide which one is right for you.

However, we’ve done the research and compiled a list of the best digital planners for GoodNotes on the iPad, so you can make an informed decision.

Good Mondays Paper

Get organized for July 2022 to June 2023 with this newly refined & streamlined hyperlinked digital planner. Staying true to its minimalist style, the planner sports clean lines and non-distracting designs to ensure that your planning personality is always at the forefront of the page. Monday & Sunday start included.

item.title: New 2023 mini calendars are out!
item.description:
2023 is just around the corner and if you want to get an early start with planning and decorating, then these mini calendars are for you!

They’re available in both individually cropped PNGs and full sheet PDF format if you want to use it as a printable.

Get it here!
